title: [v4.9] Backport two docker CLI compatibility fixes
body:
Hi,

This backports in branch 4.9 (which apparently is the last version fedora 38 and 39 will get) two docker CLI compatibility fixes merged recently in podman 5:
 - #21487
 - #21789

Note that I would also hope to see this in RHEL's 4.9 branch as we would need these two fix in the next podman upgrade in RHEL too.

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
PR needs rebase.

<details>

Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.

Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

I am not sure if we plan another 4.9 release at this time but I am not against including it here in case we do make another release at some point.

For RHEL you need to create a ticket there to request a backport.
For the RHEL backport I have created this Red Hat case https://access.redhat.com/support/cases/#/case/03748038 (I don't think I can as a customer open directly a Bugzilla/Jira ticket).
Ought to be fine, it'll get routed to us once support gets their hands on it.

@mheon: once the present PR merges, I will cherry-pick it on top of v4.9.3-rhel in a new PR and assign it to you.

<details>
